creator: rb@ravenbrook.com
text:
The port www/py-html5lib does not install.  Nothing at all happens when you run "make" or "make install" in the port directory.  This is immediately after a "portsnap fetch install" just before the date of this report.

Fix: 

Fetch and install py-html5lib by hand, but this doesn't record it as installed so it will fail to get upgraded and reinstalled properly.
How-To-Repeat: 	portsnap fetch install
	cd /usr/ports/www/py-html5lib
	make
	[nothing happens]
